title: entaticus viridis
side_effects: Entaticus viridis can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing severe allergic reactions, including hives, itching, and difficulty breathing. Prolonged exposure to the plant's toxins can also lead to nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea, resulting in dehydration and electrolyte imbalances. Additionally, improper use of entaticus viridis may cause damage to the liver and kidneys, leading to long-term health complications. In extreme cases, it can even cause cardiac arrhythmias, seizures, and coma.
